story.soThat: content script và side panel can request analysis và open chat

subtasks.subtask: Listen for messages từ content script và side panel
Extract coin info (name, symbol, price) từ message
Store coin info trong chrome.storage khi opening side panel
Get auth token từ chrome.storage (via Supabase client)
Call coin analysis API với token
Send response back to requester via `sendResponse()`
Implement retry logic for network errors
Send error messages back to requester
Test message từ content script to background
Test message từ side panel to background
Test side panel opening với coin info

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Background worker listens for messages từ content script và side panel
Worker stores coin info trong chrome.storage khi opening side panel
Worker calls API với proper authentication
Worker sends results back to requester
Error handling và retry logic implemented

doc.title: Story 13.2: API Client Adaptation
doc.snippet: API client ready với authentication. Can make API calls với JWT token.

doc.title: Story 11.3: Analysis Button Injection
doc.snippet: Content script sends ANALYZE_COIN và OPEN_SIDE_PANEL_WITH_COIN messages to background worker. Background worker opens side panel với coin info stored trong chrome.storage.

dependencies.prerequisite: Story 13.2: API client adaptation must be complete
Story 11.3: Content script sends ANALYZE_COIN và OPEN_SIDE_PANEL_WITH_COIN messages
Story 10.2: Side panel configuration in manifest must be complete

constraints.constraint: Message passing must handle async operations correctly
Error handling và retry logic must be implemented
API calls must include proper authentication
Worker must handle OPEN_SIDE_PANEL_WITH_COIN message type và store coin info trong chrome.storage
Worker must open side panel using chrome.sidePanel.open() khi receiving OPEN_SIDE_PANEL_WITH_COIN message

testing.test: Test side panel opening với coin info
Test coin info storage trong chrome.storage
